shared_attributes.movement: right to left scrolling at Current_Speed

context.role: Flying obstacle that can be avoided by ducking or passing underneath, appears after score 200+
context.screen_position: spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=80px (ground+80px), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Easier variant appearing after 200 points, player can duck or simply run underneath without input

visual_specification.shape: Pterodactyl (pteranodon) with long beak and extended wings in flying pose

animation.description: Frame 1: wings raised upward. Frame 2: wings lowered downward. Creates flapping wing animation

visual_specification.details: Pterodactyl with long pointed beak, wings spread in flight, body horizontal, flying at 80px above ground level (higher than low variant)

relationships.shared_with: Same sprite as pterodactyl_fly_low, only differs in Y position (80px vs 50px)
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_fly_low spawns at y=50px (lower, requires duck), cactus variants are ground-based (y=0px)

explicit_negations: no motion blur or flight trails
